# Eric M. Willie, P.C. — Austin Family Law Attorney

> Experienced Austin family law attorney with 20+ years, Pepperdine Law degree, 4.8 stars across 198 Google reviews. Serves Travis, Williamson, Hays, and Bastrop counties. Free consultation: (512) 478-0834.

## Practice Areas

- [Divorce](/austin-divorce-lawyer): Contested, uncontested, no-fault, fault-based divorce in Austin. Costs $3,000-$75,000+. 60-day mandatory waiting period in Texas.
- [Child Custody](/austin-child-custody-lawyer): Joint Managing Conservatorship, Sole Managing Conservatorship, Standard Possession Order, father's rights, custody modification.
- [Child Support](/austin-child-support-lawyer): Texas guidelines — 20% for 1 child, 25% for 2, 30% for 3. Income cap ~$9,200/month. Modification and enforcement.
- [Military Divorce](/austin-military-divorce-lawyer): SCRA protections, 10/10 rule for retirement division, DFAS procedures, SBP elections, Tricare eligibility, Fort Cavazos families.
- [LGBTQ Divorce](/austin-lgbtq-divorce-lawyer): Same-sex divorce, Obergefell rights, pre-2015 property issues, non-biological parent custody, transgender considerations.
- [High Net Worth Divorce](/high-net-worth-divorce-austin): Business valuations, stock options/RSUs, cryptocurrency, forensic accounting, real estate portfolios, executive compensation.
- [Property Division](/austin-property-division-lawyer): Texas community property, separate property tracing, reimbursement claims, hidden assets, QDRO retirement division.
- [Alimony](/alimony-lawyer-austin-texas): Court-ordered maintenance capped at $5,000/month. Contractual alimony has no caps. Duration: 5-10 years based on marriage length.
- [Collaborative Divorce](/austin-collaborative-divorce-lawyer): Collaborative and uncontested divorce. 40-60% less than litigation. 3-6 month resolution.
- [Adoption](/austin-adoption-lawyer): Stepparent, agency, private, interstate, foster care, adult adoption. Costs $0-$60,000 depending on type.
- [Domestic Violence](/austin-domestic-violence-lawyer): Emergency protective orders filed same day. Temporary and final protective orders. Custody intersection.
- [Paternity](/austin-paternity-lawyer): Paternity establishment, father's rights, DNA testing, Acknowledgment of Paternity, custody for unmarried fathers.
- [Grandparent Rights](/austin-grandparent-rights-lawyer): Standing requirements, Troxel analysis, kinship care, CPS cases, grandparent custody.
- [Mediation](/austin-family-law-mediation): 80% of Austin family law cases settle in mediation. MSA negotiation. $3,000-$8,000 per side.
- [Modification & Enforcement](/austin-custody-modification-lawyer): Custody modification, child support modification, contempt proceedings, relocation cases.

## Attorney Profile

Eric M. Willie graduated cum laude from Pepperdine University School of Law. 20+ years practicing family law in Austin, Texas. Limited caseload for personal attention. Serves Travis, Williamson, Hays, and Bastrop county courts. Bilingual capability (English/Spanish). Extended hours 6 AM - 10 PM, 7 days a week.
